---
title: A decade of fiber infrastructure investment transforms broadband access
description: Grouped bar chart showing fiber broadband availability over time by rurality.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-fiber-share-grouped-bar/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Technology
  - Broadband
  - Rural Development
tags:
  - FCC
  - Broadband
  - Fiber
  - Infrastructure
  - Rural vs. Nonrural
  - Bar Chart
image: fiber_share_grouped_bar.svg
chart:
  title: A decade of fiber infrastructure investment transforms broadband access
  chartType: bar
  interactive: false
  source: Federal Communications Commission
  sourceUrl: https://broadbandmap.fcc.gov/data-download
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - fcc-broadband
usesPackages:
  - cori-data-fcc
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart tracks the growth of fiber broadband availability over the past decade, showing significant infrastructure investment.](./fiber_share_grouped_bar.svg)

## Overview

This chart tracks the growth of fiber broadband availability over the past decade, showing significant infrastructure investment.

## Key Findings

- Fiber availability has increased dramatically over the past decade
- The rural-nonrural fiber gap has narrowed but persists
- Recent infrastructure investments are accelerating rural fiber deployment

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/fiber_share_grouped_bar.R` in the producing project.
